name: buffs
description: Defines buff and debuff potency, duration, and modifier constants used throughout the damage calculator for rune-granted buffs, weapon-art buffs, perk buffs, and debuff modifiers.
responsibilities: Define potency and duration constants for item-granted buffs (rage, shield, poison, shatter, slowness, sticky, etc.)
Define weapon-art-granted buff constants (warrior stomp, javelin, lightning cloak, cursed ground)
Define True Balance conversion buff constants
Define PERK_BUFFS factory constants for perk-generated buffs (perfection, bounce momentum, toadzerker, iron slayer, bastion, etc.)
Define BUFF_POTENCY_MODIFIERS for stacking and scaling modifiers
Define GENERIC_DEBUFF_MODIFIERS for endless despair and stored corruption

name: cdr
description: Defines cooldown reduction (CDR) percentage constants for various perks, weapon arts, and rune effects.
responsibilities: Define CDR percentages for caster rune, weapon art, and poison accelerator
Define CDR values for channeled weapon, runic winds, wave rider, whirlwind
Define gladiatorial set cooldown and voltaic body multiplier

name: damage-types
description: Defines all damage type metadata (labels, colors), defense inheritance rules, type priority ordering, and type groupings used throughout the damage calculation system.
responsibilities: Define damage type metadata with labels and UI colors for all 11 damage types
Define defense inheritance rules (e.g., air inherits from physical, fire inherits from water)
Define defense-tracked types and type priority ordering for resolution
Provide derived type sets for physical-inherited and magic-inherited types

name: debuff-effects
description: Defines combat effect multipliers and formula constants for debuffs including weakness, defense conversion, sticky, and despair effects.
responsibilities: Define weakness formula one-constant
Define defense conversion divisor for debuff-to-defense conversion
Define sticky damage multiplier
Define despair damage coefficient and display multipliers

name: defensive
description: Defines damage reduction (DR) constants for defensive perks including barbskin, stoneskin, adaptive plate, protector spirit, valor shield, vampire, frenzy, and mounted defense.
responsibilities: Define DR per stack values for barbskin, stoneskin, protector spirit, air pressure, valor shield, vampire, carapace
Define max DR caps for stoneskin and valor
Define adaptive plate base and triggered DR values
Define frenzy fixed DR and stored corruption DR per stack

name: dot-damage
description: Defines constants for damage-over-time (DoT) calculations including base damage, element scaling factors for bleed/burn/poison/caustic, and potency/power parameters.
responsibilities: Define base DoT damage and infliction divisor
Define element-specific scaling for bleed (DEX, physical), burn (fire), poison (hex, earth), caustic (hex, earth)
Define potency-to-power conversion and rounding parameters

name: draconic-colors
description: Defines multiplier constants for draconic color effects including speed, knockback, cooldown, damage, and stun multipliers for fire, air, earth, water, and hex dragon colors.
responsibilities: Define fire draconic speed multiplier
Define air draconic speed, knockback, and cooldown multipliers
Define earth draconic damage, speed, and stun multipliers
Define water draconic damage, speed, and stun multipliers
Define hex draconic stun and random debuff chance multipliers

name: draconic
description: Defines core draconic infusion and dragon state constants including potency/duration multipliers, HP thresholds, and bastion blessing multiplier.
responsibilities: Define draconic infusion potency and duration multipliers
Define dragon state HP base and per-stack values
Define dragon state damage base and per-stack scaling
Define bastion blessing multiplier

name: game
description: Defines core game constants including max/default level, base HP, HP scaling formula, and UI timing constants for debounce, undo, search, and toast durations.
responsibilities: Define level constants (max 80, default 80)
Define base HP and HP-per-level scaling with calcBaseMaxHP function
Define UI timing constants (save debounce, undo window, search blur, import display, focus delay, toast duration)

name: heals
description: Defines healing constants including crit healing base, holy boost divisor, crit healing per stack, and ocean song per-stack value.
responsibilities: Define crit healing base value and per-stack increment
Define holy boost divisor for crit healing
Define ocean song per-stack healing constant

name: constants-index
description: Barrel re-export module that aggregates all constants sub-modules into a single importable namespace.
responsibilities: Re-export all constants from damage-types, game, storage, thresholds, perks, boosts, heals, draconic, perk-base-damage, rune-base-damage, buffs, stat-conversions, defensive, dot-damage, draconic-colors, cdr, and debuff-effects

name: perk-base-damage
description: Defines base damage values, per-stack scaling, and special parameters for perk-triggered damage effects including dragon claw/bubble, spirits, springblast, air pressure, whirlwind, and many more.
responsibilities: Define base damage and per-stack values for Dragon Claw and Dragon Bubble (including holy/water heal values and poise damage)
Define springblast hit/mult constants
Define spirit base damage values (basic, buni, mageling, toadzerker, dire buni, void root, protector)
Define air pressure, air barrier, roaring heads, barbed flurry, honey arts, sickness damage constants
Define melting slime fire/earth scaling, whirlwind, volatile shell, royal finisher, grounded despair damage
Define echo incineration, venom spitter, spore burst, apollo boost, and bomber charge constants
Define HP gate thresholds for dragon state, bellowing ember, and protector spirit

name: perks
description: Defines perk scaling constants including percent-per-stack values, crit rate/damage formulas, mortal will, sunburn, frostbite, fiery pursuit, and hypnotist mechanics.
responsibilities: Define percent-per-stack scaling for luminescent, spirit winds, dark magic, emotional, toxin transfer, void rage, channeled weapon, draconic blood
Define wind walker penetration and reaper per-debuff scaling
Define crit base values (base damage 150%, dex divisor, primal divisor)
Define perk crit-rate multiplier constants (flowing crits, spell slinger, sharp crits, seismic momentum, perfection, caci king spirit)
Define perk crit-damage formula constants (thief training, venom eater, vital strikes, spark, critical master, splinter)
Define mortal will, sunburn, frostbite, fiery pursuit, and hypnotist perk constants

name: rune-base-damage
description: Defines base damage values, hit counts, and special parameters for rune-triggered attacks including ancient cleric, beenade, boostshroom, thunderous charge, sporeling toss, foot dive, caci, cacitrops, hex web, brainblast, and rocky tail.
responsibilities: Define ancient cleric base damage, slider max, shield values
Define beenade base damage and max potency
Define boostshroom and thunderous charge base damage
Define sporeling toss base damage, hits, and slider max
Define foot dive base damage
Define caci, cacitrops, hex web, brainblast base damage and hit counts
Define rocky tail damage scaling, protector scaling, vs-level resolution, and hit multiplier

name: stat-conversions
description: Defines stat boost conversion rates for perks that convert between stat categories, including weight distribution, quick witted, carapace, frozen heart, righted wrongs, spellshield, true balance, and rawny.
responsibilities: Define weight distribution split ratio and multiplier
Define conversion rates for quick witted, whirl foot, carapace, extra layers, frozen heart, immovable
Define righted wrongs coefficients with tenacity/offense weights and speed fraction
Define rocky body, spellshield, strong tides, swift guard, true balance, rawny conversion rates and caps
Define subtraction constants for roaring headings, lucky warding/protection/tenacity

name: storage
description: Defines localStorage keys, build state defaults, save key mapping/compression, and enchantment slot mapping for build persistence.
responsibilities: Define localStorage key names for build, defenses, level, HP fill, and saves
Define build state defaults with all equipment slots and their initial values
Define save key map for URL/build serialization (long key to short key compression)
Define enchantment slot mapping and inverse mapping
Define max build slots and confirm timeout

name: thresholds
description: Defines threshold constants for armor penetration branching, minimum cooldown, and base crit damage percentage.
responsibilities: Define armor penetration branch threshold (20%)
Define minimum cooldown value (1)
Define base crit damage percentage (100%)

name: crit
description: Implements the critical hit calculation engine, computing natural crit chance, extra crit sources, crit damage multiplier, Primal interaction, proc coefficient scaling, and full breakdown for UI display.
responsibilities: Calculate natural crit chance from dexterity boost and elemental perk sources (Flowing Crits, Spell Slinger, Sharp Crits, Perfection, Seismic Momentum)
Calculate extra crit sources (Carrying Winds, Caci King Spirit/King's Luck)
Calculate crit damage multiplier from Thief Training, Venom Eater, Vital Strikes, Spark, Critical Master, Splinter
Apply Primal interaction (divides natural crit and natural-equivalent crit damage sources by PRIMAL_DIVISOR)
Compute combined effective crit chance using independent probability formula
Scale crit chances with proc coefficient (positiveOnly mode)
Produce detailed breakdown arrays for UI display of crit sources and crit damage sources

name: damageTypeResolve
description: Resolves damage type distributions by merging base types with bonuses, handling fire/air conversion (Echo Incineration), weapon art damage type selection, and air-to-magic conversion (Spirit Winds + Dark Magic).
responsibilities: Resolve base damage types with additive bonus merging (resolveDamageTypes)
Apply fire-air bidirectional conversion at 50% rate (applyFireAirConversion)
Resolve weapon art damage type keys from selection string, including highest-type resolution with priority tiebreaking
Get final weapon art damage types by applying bonuses on top of resolved base types
Apply air-to-magic conversion (Spirit Winds) before fire-air conversion, then Dark Magic hex addition

name: defense
description: Implements defense/damage reduction calculations including percent-based and flat DR resolution, multiplier chaining, true DR percent computation, and base armor defense percentage lookup by damage type.
responsibilities: Calculate defense multiplier from defense percentage (1/(1+def) for positive, 1+|def| for negative)
Calculate true DR percentage from defense value
Resolve defense sources into percent-based and flat categories, compute chained multipliers
Map damage types to their applicable defense stat groups (DEF_GROUP)
Calculate base armor defense percentage for a given damage type from stat records

name: dmgTypes
description: Defines UI badge configuration for proc/on-hit effects and core TypeScript interfaces for computed damage types, perk on-hit damage, and computed hits used throughout the damage calculation engine.
responsibilities: Define badge configuration with colors, labels, and descriptions for 15 proc/on-hit effects (Dragon State, Spore Burst, Chain, Luminescent, Explosive, Springblast, etc.)
Define ComputedType interface for individual damage type calculation results
Define PerkOnHitDmg interface for perk-triggered on-hit damage calculations
Define ComputedHit interface for grouped hit calculation results

name: EnchantSelect
description: A custom Svelte dropdown component for selecting enchantments, featuring color-coded options, search/filter functionality, keyboard navigation, portal-based positioning, and full ARIA accessibility.
responsibilities: Render a custom select dropdown with enchantment color dots and labels
Provide search/filter functionality for enchantment names
Handle keyboard navigation (arrow keys, enter, escape)
Position dropdown via fixed portal positioning with scroll/resize tracking
Dispatch 'change' event on selection
Define color map for ~50 enchantment types with specific RGB values

name: enchantTooltip
description: Generates formatted tooltip text for enchantments by fetching enchantment data from the engine and formatting description, stat modifiers, effects, and notes into a multi-line string.
responsibilities: Fetch enchantment data by name from engine
Format enchantment description, stats (with multiplier vs flat distinction), effects, and additional notes
Return formatted multi-line tooltip string

name: engine
description: Barrel re-export module that aggregates all engine sub-modules (data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, format) into a single importable namespace.
responsibilities: Re-export all engine modules: data, shrine, enchant, weapon, build, format

name: engine/_utils
description: Provides low-level numeric rounding utilities used throughout the engine for consistent precision in damage calculations.
responsibilities: Provide round2 function for 2-decimal-place rounding with epsilon correction
Provide round4 function for 4-decimal-place rounding with epsilon correction
